title: Beille Stainless Steel Kitchen Scissors Food Prep 8.5 Inch Cutlery Shears Black
description:
Whether you use as food scissors, cooking scissors, meat scissors or utility scissors, these all purpose kitchen shears from Beille will have all your cooking, baking and food prep tasks covered in the kitchen, with comfortable ergonomic handles, stainless steel blades and a built in nut cracker! Featuring high quality hardened stainless steel blades, the scissors will cut through everything you need to in the kitchen from paper, packaging, twine and herbs, to fish, chicken and more; stainless steel is an ideal material for scissors due to its durability, resistance to corrosion and high temperatures

Beille Stainless Steel Kitchen Scissors Food Prep 8.5 Inch Cutlery Shears Black

Whether you use as food scissors, cooking scissors, meat scissors or utility scissors, these all purpose kitchen shears from Beille will have all your cooking, baking and food prep tasks covered in the kitchen, with comfortable ergonomic handles, stainless steel blades and a built in nut cracker!

Key Features

  • SECURE GRIP HANDLE - Beille kitchen scissors are designed with a matte black polypropylene handle to ensure a secure, non-slip grip to protect your hands during use. Ergonomic handle provides comfort during cutting and prepping
  • NUT CRACKER INCLUDED - Kitchen shears come with a hardshell nutcracker opener on the inside of the handles for cracking various foods like nuts and shells (use to crack seafood shells and hard nuts to make food prep easier)
  • DURABLE AND LIGHTWEIGHT - Scissors feature stainless steel blades that are both rust and odor-resistant, ideal for safely preparing food. Cutlery quality shears weigh just .4lbs and are dishwasher safe for easy clean up
  • ESSENTIAL KITCHEN TOOL - Use to prepare almost anything in the kitchen including boneless chicken, raw and cooked meat, poultry bones, fish, herbs and vegetables. Also great for cutting cooking prep items like foil, parchment paper, oven liners and wax paper
  • SPECIFICATIONS - Overall length: 8.5”; Thickness of blades: 3/32” (2.5mm); Materials: stainless steel (blades), polypropylene (handle); Color: black; Weight: .4lbs (6.4oz); Dishwasher safe: yes

Product Specifications

  • MPN: BEKITCHSBLK85
  • UPC: 810058486486
  • Color: Black

Featuring high quality hardened stainless steel blades, the scissors will cut through everything you need to in the kitchen from paper, packaging, twine and herbs, to fish, chicken and more; stainless steel is an ideal material for scissors due to its durability, resistance to corrosion and high temperatures.These kitchen scissors or shears can also be put to work outside the kitchen as utility scissors too! Great for gardening, arts and crafts, slicing through cardboard, in the garage or office, these scissors from Beille are useful all throughout the house.

And, while handwashing is recommended to increase longevity of kitchen scissors, the stainless steel shears can go in the dishwasher when needed (ensure to fully dry after hand or dish washing).

FDA Compliant.
